Name: ESP32 30 Pin CP2102 Development Board
Purpose: Main microcontroller for self-driving path planning and web dashboard hosting

Name: MPU6050 3-Axis Gyroscope and Accelerometer
Purpose: IMU sensor to track relative yaw heading angle for straight line driving

Name: MX1508 Dual H Bridge DC Motor Driver Module
Purpose: H-Bridge driver to control speed and steering direction of the DC motor

Name: GB37-555 12V DC Gear Motor 300RPM
Purpose: High torque DC gear motor to drive the explorer rover chassis wheels

Name: YX5300 MP3 Voice Player Music Module
Purpose: Hardware sound decoder to play status warnings and vocal responses

Name: OMIGA TCL 8 Ohm 10 Watt Dynamic Speaker
Purpose: Dynamic speaker for vocal playback output from the MP3 card

Name: HC-SR04 Ultrasonic Sensor Module
Purpose: Ranging sensors for front left and right obstacle routing

Name: XY-3606 5A Step Down Power Supply Buck Converter
Purpose: Steps down 11.1V battery voltage to stable 5V for the ESP32 and logic chips

Name: 11.1V 4200mAh 3S 60C LiPo Rechargeable Battery
Purpose: High capacity rechargeable power pack for driving the heavy-duty gear motors

Name: 6WD All Terrain Explorer Rover Chassis Kit
Purpose: High mobility 6WD chassis plate kit including suspension frames and wheels

Name: MB102 Breadboard with Jumper Wires (Set of 80)
Purpose: Prototyping board with male and female jumper wires to connect sensor pins
